# Community Data Assets

PyData Johannesburg maintains strategic data assets that drive community operations, enable personalized member experiences, and support long-term sustainability and growth.

## Data Asset Classification

### Member and Engagement Data
- **Member profiles**: Contact information, professional background, interests
- **Engagement history**: Event attendance, platform participation, contribution patterns
- **Skill mapping**: Technical expertise, learning goals, mentorship capabilities
- **Network analysis**: Professional connections, referral patterns, collaboration history

### Speaker and Content Data
- **Speaker database**: Contact details, expertise areas, presentation history
- **Content library**: Presentation materials, code repositories, educational resources
- **Performance metrics**: Audience feedback, engagement scores, content effectiveness
- **Pipeline management**: Availability, topic development, speaking progression

### Partnership and Venue Data
- **Corporate relationships**: Contact networks, partnership history, employee engagement
- **Venue information**: Facility specifications, booking procedures, partnership terms
- **Sponsor tracking**: Contribution history, ROI metrics, relationship development
- **Ecosystem connections**: Other communities, organizations, collaboration opportunities

## Speaker Database Management

### Core Speaker Information

**Contact and Professional Details**
```yaml
speaker_id: "SP2026001"
name: "Dr. Sarah Williams"
email: "sarah.williams@university.ac.za"
linkedin: "linkedin.com/in/sarahwilliams"
twitter: "@sarahwilliamsdata"
organization: "University of Cape Town"
role: "Senior Lecturer, Computer Science"
location: "Cape Town, South Africa"
willing_to_travel: true
travel_radius: "500km"
```

**Expertise and Content Areas**
```yaml
primary_expertise: ["machine-learning", "natural-language-processing"]
secondary_expertise: ["data-visualization", "python-teaching"]
industry_experience: ["finance", "healthcare", "education"]
technical_tools: ["scikit-learn", "pandas", "matplotlib", "jupyter"]
audience_levels: ["beginner", "intermediate"]
presentation_formats: ["technical-talk", "workshop", "panel-discussion"]
```

**Availability and Preferences**
```yaml
available_months: ["march", "april", "may", "august", "september"]
preferred_notice: "4-weeks"
equipment_needs: ["projector", "microphone", "flip-chart"]
special_requirements: ["dietary-vegan", "accessibility-ramp"]
compensation: "travel-expenses-only"
recording_consent: true
slide_sharing: "cc-by-license"
```

### Performance Tracking and Development

**Presentation History**
```yaml
previous_talks:
  - event_date: "2025-11-15"
    title: "Introduction to Natural Language Processing"
    attendance: 45
    feedback_score: 4.7
    audience_level: "beginner"
    repeat_invitation: true
    
  - event_date: "2024-08-20"
    title: "Advanced Text Analysis with Python"
    attendance: 32
    feedback_score: 4.4
    audience_level: "intermediate"
    technical_issues: "minor-microphone-feedback"
```

**Development and Support Notes**
```yaml
first_time_speaker: false
mentorship_provided: true
coaching_areas: ["audience-engagement", "live-coding-techniques"]
improvement_trajectory: "excellent"
future_development: ["keynote-potential", "workshop-development"]
referral_network: ["SP2025032", "SP2025018"]
```

### Privacy and Consent Management

**Data Protection Compliance**
- **Explicit consent**: Clear opt-in for data retention and communication
- **Purpose limitation**: Data used only for community management and speaker coordination
- **Access controls**: Limited organizer access with role-based permissions
- **Retention policies**: Regular review and cleanup of outdated information
- **Portability**: Member ability to export their data upon request

**Consent Tracking**
```yaml
consent_records:
  - consent_type: "speaker-database-inclusion"
    date_granted: "2025-10-15"
    method: "email-confirmation"
    scope: ["contact-info", "professional-background", "speaking-history"]
    
  - consent_type: "future-event-contact"
    date_granted: "2025-10-15"
    renewal_date: "2026-10-15"
    communication_preferences: ["email", "linkedin"]
```

## Corporate Partnership Database

### Partnership Relationship Management

**Organization Profile**
```yaml
organization_id: "ORG2026001"
name: "Standard Bank Group"
industry: "financial-services"
size: "large-enterprise"
location: "Sandton, Johannesburg"
data_science_maturity: "advanced"
website: "standardbank.co.za"
partnership_since: "2024-03-01"
```

**Key Contacts and Relationships**
```yaml
primary_contacts:
  - name: "Michael Chen"
    role: "Head of Data Science"
    email: "michael.chen@standardbank.co.za"
    relationship_strength: "strong"
    responsiveness: "excellent"
    decision_authority: "budget-approval"
    
  - name: "Lisa Johnson"
    role: "Facilities Manager"
    email: "lisa.johnson@standardbank.co.za"
    relationship_strength: "good"
    responsiveness: "good"
    venue_coordination: "primary-contact"
```

**Partnership Activities and Value**
```yaml
venue_partnership:
  events_hosted: 8
  capacity: 80
  technical_rating: "excellent"
  catering_provided: true
  parking_available: true
  accessibility_compliant: true
  
speaker_pipeline:
  employee_speakers: 6
  presentation_quality: "high"
  topics_covered: ["fintech", "risk-modeling", "regulatory-compliance"]
  
sponsorship_contribution:
  annual_value: "R15000"
  cash_sponsorship: "R5000"
  in_kind_value: "R10000"
  catering_events: 4
```

### Partnership Development Tracking

**Engagement History**
```yaml
engagement_timeline:
  - date: "2024-03-01"
    type: "initial-meeting"
    outcome: "venue-partnership-agreed"
    next_steps: ["facility-tour", "legal-agreement"]
    
  - date: "2024-04-15"
    type: "first-event-hosting"
    attendance: 65
    feedback: "very-positive"
    issues: ["parking-communication-needed"]
    
  - date: "2025-01-10"
    type: "annual-review-meeting"
    outcomes: ["expanded-catering-support", "employee-speaker-program"]
    renewal_status: "confirmed-2025"
```

**Partnership Performance Metrics**
```yaml
performance_indicators:
  events_per_year: 4
  average_attendance: 68
  venue_satisfaction_score: 4.8
  employee_engagement_rate: "12%"
  repeat_hosting_willingness: "high"
  partnership_satisfaction: "excellent"
```

## Member Engagement Analytics

### Individual Member Profiles

**Engagement Tracking**
```yaml
member_id: "MEM2026001"
name: "Alex Thompson"
join_date: "2024-08-15"
membership_tier: "active-contributor"

engagement_summary:
  events_attended: 12
  attendance_rate: "85%"
  question_asking_frequency: "high"
  networking_activity: "moderate"
  volunteer_contributions: 3
  
interest_areas: ["data-engineering", "mlops", "cloud-platforms"]
skill_level: "intermediate-advanced"
learning_goals: ["kubernetes-for-ml", "model-monitoring"]
mentorship: 
  seeking: ["career-advancement", "technical-leadership"]
  offering: ["python-basics", "data-preprocessing"]
```

**Contribution History**
```yaml
contributions:
  - type: "volunteer"
    date: "2025-02-15"
    role: "event-registration-assistant"
    performance: "excellent"
    
  - type: "lightning-talk"
    date: "2025-06-10"
    title: "Docker for Data Scientists"
    feedback_score: 4.2
    follow_up_interest: "workshop-development"
    
  - type: "community-project"
    project: "beginner-tutorial-series"
    role: "content-reviewer"
    time_contribution: "10-hours"
```

### Community Health Metrics

**Engagement Distribution**
```yaml
member_segmentation:
  highly_active: 45  # Attend 80%+ events, contribute regularly
  regularly_active: 120  # Attend 50%+ events
  occasionally_active: 200  # Attend 20%+ events
  subscribers: 435  # Registered but minimal attendance
  
engagement_trends:
  new_member_retention_30_days: "65%"
  new_member_retention_90_days: "40%"
  average_member_lifespan: "18-months"
  progression_to_contributor: "15%"
```

**Community Growth Analysis**
```yaml
growth_metrics:
  monthly_new_members: 25
  monthly_churn_rate: "8%"
  net_growth_rate: "12%"
  referral_rate: "35%"
  
engagement_quality:
  average_event_satisfaction: 4.6
  question_asking_rate: "68%"
  post_event_discussion: "moderate"
  cross_platform_engagement: "45%"
```

## Data Operations and Governance

### Data Quality Management

**Data Validation Procedures**
- **Contact information**: Regular verification through communication attempts
- **Professional details**: LinkedIn profile cross-referencing and updates
- **Engagement metrics**: Automated tracking with manual audit processes
- **Consent status**: Annual renewal reminders and compliance checking

**Data Accuracy Standards**
- **Contact details**: 95% deliverability rate for email communications
- **Professional information**: Updated within 6 months of changes
- **Engagement tracking**: Real-time event attendance with 48-hour reconciliation
- **Partnership data**: Quarterly review and update cycles

### Security and Access Controls

**Access Management**
```yaml
access_levels:
  full_database_access: ["community-lead", "data-manager"]
  speaker_database_access: ["speaker-coordinator", "event-coordinator"]
  partnership_data_access: ["partnership-manager", "community-lead"]
  analytics_access: ["all-organizers"]
  member_data_access: ["community-managers", "event-coordinators"]
```

**Security Measures**
- **Encryption**: All personal data encrypted at rest and in transit
- **Backup procedures**: Daily automated backups with quarterly restore testing
- **Audit logging**: Complete access and modification tracking
- **Regular security reviews**: Annual penetration testing and vulnerability assessment

### Analytics and Insights Generation

**Automated Reporting**
- **Weekly**: Event attendance and engagement summaries
- **Monthly**: Community growth and health dashboards
- **Quarterly**: Partnership performance and strategic analysis
- **Annually**: Comprehensive community impact and development assessment

**Strategic Intelligence**
- **Trend identification**: Content preferences, engagement patterns, growth opportunities
- **Resource optimization**: Speaker pipeline efficiency, venue utilization, partnership ROI
- **Risk assessment**: Member churn indicators, partnership vulnerabilities, sustainability metrics
- **Opportunity analysis**: Expansion possibilities, partnership development, program enhancement

Well-managed community data assets enable personalized experiences, strategic decision-making, and sustainable growth while maintaining member trust and regulatory compliance.
